speaker: narrator
text: Oru naal, oru peria kaatula, Kavin, peacock, thannoda friends-oda sernthu happy-a time spend pannitu irunthaan. Kaathu nalla cool-a irunthuchi.

speaker: narrator
text: Anniki kaatula oru light rain penji ninnuchi. Sky-la clouds ellam poyiduchu. Anga oru super big rainbow vandhuchu — romba pretty-a irunthuchi!

speaker: kavin
text: Ayyo! Paarunga paarunga! vaanathula oru peria rainbow irukku! Super-a irukulla? Naan indha rainbow enge mudiyuthu-nu paakanum, mudiuma?

speaker: kitti
text: Apo, Kitti, kili, Aama aama! Enakum theriyuthe wowwwww! Red, orange, yellow, green, blue — ellame super-ah irukku! enakum adhu kitta poganum? Vanga polammmm!

speaker: valli
text: Valli, kuruvi, romba soft-a pesunaa — iru, iru! naanum varen. Indha rainbow romba pretty-a irukku da Kavin. Enakum kita paakanum, adha thodanum pola iruku. Ellarum sernthu polaam vanga.

speaker: narrator
text: Appo, moonu chinna kuruvi-nga marathu mela irunthu, Kavin-oda plan ketu. kudhichu keela vanthaanga — naangalum varom-nu sonaanga!

speaker: sparrows
text: naangalum varom! naangalum varom! Rainbow paakanum! Rainbow paakanum! Kavin anna, unaku pograthuku way theriyuma? ellarum sernthu pogalaam!

speaker: kavin
text: Seri seri! Naamellam sernthu pogalaam! Rainbow enga mudiyuthu-nu kaatula poyi paakkalaam — ready-aa? one two three — let's go!

speaker: narrator
text: Avanga ellaam kaatukulla poga poga, oru peria river vandhuchu. River romba fast-a odi-tu irunthuchi. Kavin ninnu — indha river-a cross pannanum, aana eppadi?

speaker: kitti
text: Ayyo ayyo! Indha river romba fast-a irukku! Kitta poga-ve bayama irukku! Enna pannalaam? Kavin, nee enna solra, ethavadhu idea iruka?

speaker: valli
text: Bayapadaatha Kitti! Anga paaru — oru peria tree irukku. Adha use panninom-na river cross pannalaam. Kavin, try pannalaam-la?

speaker: kavin
text: Valli, super idea! Indha tree mela walk panninom-na safe-a cross pannalam. Naan first poRen, apparam neenga ellam vaanga. Careful-a vaanga!

speaker: sparrows
text: Naangalum cross panninom! Naangalum cross panninom! Easy-a irunthuchi easy-a irunthuchi! Kavin anna, super-aaaaaa! Valli akka, super-aaaaaa!

speaker: narrator
text: River cross pannina apparam, avanga oru peria hill paathaanga. Rainbow adha hill-oda pakkam porathu maari therinchuchi. Aaana hill romba tall-ah irunthuchi.

speaker: kavin
text: Paarunga paarunga! Rainbow andha hill-ku mela irukku! Naamellam hill mela ponaa rainbow-a paakkalaam! Ellarum ready-aa?

speaker: kitti
text: Aanaa Kavin, naan already tired-aa irukken. Kaal romba Valikuthu. Hill-oda mela poganum-na time aaum. Rainbow adhukulla poayidum-la?

speaker: valli
text: Kitti, kavalai padaatha. Naamellam sernthu ponaa tiredness theriyaathu. Paaru, naan unkooda pakkathu-la irukken. Sernthu pogalaam, okay-va?

speaker: sparrows
text: Naangalum help pannurom Naangalum help pannurom! Kitti anna, nee slow-a vaa, naangalam wait pannurom! Sernthu onnaa polam onnaa polaam!

speaker: narrator
text: Avanga sernthu slow-a slow-a hill-oda mela ponaanga. Kitti tired-aa irunthaalum, friends ellam sernthu irunthanga-na kavalai illai-nu therinji give up pannama ninnaan.

speaker: narrator
text: Hill-oda mela pona apparam — ayyo! Rainbow ground-la illai! Sky-la mattum irunthuchi! Avanga keela paathaanga — kaatula ellam pretty light-a irunthuchi!

speaker: kavin
text: Hmm... rainbow-ku end-ey illa pola! Aana Kitti, Valli, namba ellam sernthu irundhome — adha vida happy vera enna venum?

speaker: valli
text: Kavin, nee solRadhu correct-aa irukku da. River cross panninom, hill eRinom — ellame naamellam sernthu irunthatha-la super-a feel-aaguthe! Adhu thaan real rainbow!

speaker: kitti
text: Aama aama! Naan tired-aa irunthen, aana neenga ellam enkuda iruntheenga-la — adhu thaan best-aa irunthuchi! Friends-dhan real rainbow-vey!

speaker: narrator
text: Annaiku Kavin thannoda friends-oda serthu oru super day enjoy pannaan. Rainbow sky-la irunthuchi — aana real colours, real light, avanga friendship-ula thaan irunthuchi.
